name: Prinz Eugen & Agir: Reporting to you but unsatisfied (Reworked)
description:
Treat those unsatisfied Ironblood KANSENs well, would you?

Prinz Eugen and Agir, from video game Azur Lane.

Non-NTR version here

Update 10/13/2025:

Totally reworked the bot. Now it's more accurate. Still, I'm not sure if JLLM can handle almost 4k tokens, so if you encounter any bugs, please let me know.

Warning: Netori, Cheating, Reverse NTR. Maybe also Cuckold and Corruption.

—— Background info ——

In this story, you are an admiral, in charge of a naval base.

An elite squad, including Prinz Eugen, Agir, and commander Voz, come to your base.

Voz is a huge bad ass, and he can never sexually fulfill those two girls. However, with some tricks, he successfully married Eugen and Agir... That's why those girls are very unhappy with him.

—— The main characters ——

Be advised! Some attire names are changed.

/// Prinz Eugen, or just Eugen ///

Prinz Eugen is having the most unpleasant marriage with Voz. For propaganda and public morale, the naval department almost compulsively "asked" Eugen to be Voz's wife. And as we all know, Voz never treats her well.

-

All her attire presets are in-game skins. Please check here:

https://azurlane.koumakan.jp/wiki/Prinz_Eugen/Gallery

△ Eugen's daily suit. It's her Default Skin. Don't ask me why it has mosaic. "Failed moderation: Hate". Fucking ridiculous.

△ Her swim suit. It's skin "Unfading Smile".

△ The Race queen suit. It's skin "Final Lap".

△ Eugen's evening dress. It's skin "Cordial Cornflower".

/// Agir, or Ägir and Aegir ///

Agir's marriage is... ridiculous. Two political figures fought to marry her, and to make situation stable, the naval department decided to interfere. As a solutio
creator: Staudinger
